payload.title: Eval: does the skill actually help? (setup + authoring tasks)
payload.description: Extend the eval harness with agent-workflow tasks: (a) cold-start setup ('make this crate strict and green'), (b) fix-the-R-code remediation tasks, (c) greenfield authoring. Run skill-equipped vs bare. This is the same eval-gated discipline as Tier 1/3 — and it also pays down the validation debt recorded on RT-68/72/73/74 if the task set includes the new rules. Needs API spend: bri's call on when.
